src/main/java/de/muenchen/dave/configura.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace deprecated `authorizeRequests()` with `authorizeHttpRequests()` using lambda configuration to comply with Spring Security 6+ API changes required for JDK 21 compatibility.
Replace deprecated `headers().frameOptions().disable()` chain with lambda-based `headers()` configuration to align with modern Spring Security API.
Replace deprecated `csrf().disable()` chain with lambda-based `csrf()` configuration using method reference.
Add necessary imports for the new Spring Security configuration classes used in the lambda migrations.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions on JDK 21.
Replace deprecated Spring Security 5 imperative API methods with Spring Security 6 lambda-based DSL to ensure compilation on JDK 21.
Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers using AntPathRequestMatcher to align with Spring Security 6 API.
Migrate header configuration from implicit chain to explicit lambda configurer for frame options.
Migrate CSRF configuration to use the new lambda-based ignoringRequestMatchers API.
Migrate OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL.
